⚡ SIGNAL ENGINE — PRICE · DPO · VOLUME · QML — 4 LAYERS ONLY
WAIT
Enter values below and calculate
0 / 4 layers confirmed
Confidence: 0%
Layer 1 — Price / Pivot
Not calculated
Layer 2 — DPO Cycle
Not calculated
Layer 3 — Volume Rule
Not calculated
Layer 4 — QML Level
Not calculated
◆ Layer 1 — Price / Pivot
Close > Pivot = Bullish bias
Close < Pivot + RSI < 50 = Downtrend
◆ Layer 2 — DPO Cycle Strength
DPO > 0 + Rising = Cycle strong
DPO < 0 = Cycle weak, wait or short
◆ Layer 3 — Volume Rule
7B+ at top = distribution (bear)
7M+ at support = accumulation (bull)
5 candle streak = breakout imminent
◆ Layer 4 — QML Level
At support + volume dry = accumulation
Above M = bullish structure confirmed

⬇ EOD DATA IMPORT — GOOGLE SHEETS CSV · AFTER 3PM SESSION CLOSE
◆ Import EOD Data
🏦 Nepal Public Holiday / Market Closed
Toggle ON to skip today's update
Last ImportNever
Scrips Loaded0
Session StatusReady for import
Market Day—
📂
Click or drag your CSV file here
Export from Google Sheets after 3pm
File → Download → CSV (.csv)
Supports: Scrip, O, H, L, C, Volume, Range, Range%
Column Format (Auto-detected)
A → S.No
B → Symbol
C → LTP/Close
D → Pt Change
E → % Change
F → Open
G → High
H → Low
I → Volume
J → Prev.Close
ⓘ Matched to your Google Sheet exactly · Close = LTP
◆ How To Export from Google Sheets
Every day after 3pm:
1. Open your Google Sheet
2. Click File menu
3. Click Download
4. Click Comma Separated Values (.csv)
5. File saves to Downloads folder
6. Come back here → drag that file in
7. Click Import ✅
Nepal Market Schedule:
● Trading days: Mon–Fri
● Closed: Sat, Sun + Public holidays
● Session close: 3:00 PM NPT
● EOD data ready: After 3:05 PM
Expected CSV format:
S.No,Symbol,LTP,Pt Change,% Change,Open,High,Low,Volume,Prev.Close
1,ACLBSL,925,-17.2,-1.83,916,942.9,916,512,942.7
2,ADBL,307,0.2,0.07,310,310,304,10218,306.8
3,EBL,700,2,0.29,701,709,700,14095,698
Range = High - Close
Small range + high volume = strong close (bolt candle)
Large range + high volume = distribution (bearish)
Small range + low volume = dry phase (accumulation)
EOD Data Preview 0 scrips loaded
#ScripOpenHighLow CloseVolumeRange (H-C)Range %Signal
☑ WEEKLY UPDATE CHECKLIST — EVERY SUNDAY AFTER MARKET CLOSE
Weekly Completion
0%
0 of 12 tasks completed
◆ Data Update
Weekly OHLC entered Edit Inputs
Weekly pivot (P) calculated P = (H+L+C)/3
DPO 21 value updated Cycle check
Weekly volume noted 7B/7M rule
QML levels reviewed & adjusted Level Manager
◆ Signal Check
Signal Engine calculated ⚡ Signal tab
First candle pivot bias noted Above/Below P
Volume dry or spike confirmed 2603–2611 zone
HydroPower sector bias checked Sector drag?
◆ Publish & Share
Dashboard exported (CSV/HTML) Export bar
Tiiny.host file updated qml-v2.tiiny.site
Video / post published YouTube · TikTok
